caption: The video features an elderly man with gray hair tied back, wearing glasses and a traditional-style shirt adorned with eagle motifs and colorful bands. He stands behind a podium with a microphone, addressing an audience. The man appears to be delivering a speech or presentation, as he holds papers in his hands and occasionally looks down at them while speaking. The background consists of wooden slats, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a conference room or lecture hall. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the organization or event associated with the video. The atmosphere seems formal and attentive, with the audience listening closely to the speaker.
